wallpaper.postHook: pkill -x mpvpaper; mpvpaper -o "no-audio loop hwdec=auto" "*" "$WALLPAPER_PATH" & disown; case "$WALLPAPER_PATH" in *.mp4|*.mkv|*.webm|*.mov|*.m4v) out="$HOME/.cache/caelestia/video-thumbs/$(basename "$WALLPAPER_PATH").jpg"; mkdir -p "$HOME/.cache/caelestia/video-thumbs"; [ -f "$out" ] || ffmpeg -y -i "$WALLPAPER_PATH" -vframes 1 -vf scale=480:-1 "$out" -loglevel error ;; esac
